modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: PDF content not fully visible in Adobe Acrobat on macOS

full_description_text: 
I am having a problem with my Adobe Acrobat 2017 on my macOS. When I open the PDFs, some details are missing and I cannot see everything that is supposed to be there. I tried to open the same PDFs on another platform, and they show all the content correctly. It is very confusing because I need to see all the information in the documents.

description: I am having a problem with my Adobe Acrobat 2017 on my macOS. When I open the PDFs, some details are missing and I cannot see everything that is supposed to be there. I tried to open the same PDFs on another platform, and they show all the content correctly. It is very confusing because I need to see all the information in the documents.
